skills.languages: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Typescript, C#, T-SQL
skills.technologies: Angular, React.js, Redux, .NET, .NET Core, Entity Framework, Dapper, Azure DevOps

tasks: Developed new features for legacy Windows applications using C#, while also maintaining and fixing critical functionality in older VB-based apps, ensuring system stability and enhancing user experience.

Led the team during PI planning, identifying key challenges, proposing actionable solutions, and documenting strategies to enhance alignment and efficiency between business and IT teams, resulting in a 10% improvement in project delivery timelines.

Developed a real-time health monitoring system and dashboard with React, Tailwind CSS, and Azure Workbooks, reducing resource failure detection times from 8-10 hours to just 10-15 minutes across 50+ applications, enhancing business responsiveness.
Stabilized a legacy subscription management system, resolving recurring failures and deployment issues, supporting over 50K vendors and 1 million members, and reducing support tickets by 30%.

Modernized legacy applications by transitioning from TFS to Git, updating framework versions, and implementing automated CI/CD pipelines, resulting in a 20% improvement in system performance and faster deployments.
Collaborated with peers to implement microservices using .NET 8, RabbitMQ, and Web API, restructuring legacy applications to enhance member subscription processing and system scalability.
Led and mentored a small team of junior developers, providing guidance and oversight to ensure quality and efficiency in project deliverables.
Developed and maintained software applications following the team’s best practices and processes, consistently delivering high‐quality, maintainable software.
Effectively collaborated with peers and the QA team to gather requirements, resolve issues, and manage time‐sensitive updates, ensuring project success.
Demonstrated leadership and technical skills, capable of handling demanding project tasks, resolving issues, and meeting deadlines.
Conducted regular code reviews and pair programming sessions, providing constructive feedback and guidance to junior developers

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering - Computer Science & Engineering
